✅ Implements all metrics used by goals/badges/maintenance (v1)
jobs

on-time rules (±15 minutes + 250m)

clock-in/out success

photo validity (1 before + 1 after within clock window)

meaningful messages

meaningful logins + streak

acceptance rate with good-faith exclusion and 6/week cap

repeat clients

ratings

disputes + lifetime lost-rate

tips

composite badge conditions (review whisperer, tip jar energy)

add-ons completion count

import { MetricProvider, MetricValue, Window } from "../../puretask_gamification_step5/src/types";
import { withClient } from "../db/client";

/**
 * SqlMetricProvider (FULL, v1)
 *
 * Assumptions (sane defaults):
 * - Domain tables exist: jobs, ratings, disputes, messages, tips
 * - Event log exists: pt_event_log (from Step 4)
 * - Engagement tables exist: pt_engagement_sessions, pt_engagement_actions (from Step 4)
 *
 * Jobs table expected columns (minimum):
 * - id, cleaner_id, client_id, status, completed_at, cleaning_type, time_slot, lat, lng
 *
 * Event payload expectations:
 * - job.clock_in: { job_id, clock_in_at, scheduled_start_at, lat, lng }
 * - job.clock_out:{ job_id, clock_out_at, lat, lng }
 * - job.photo_uploaded: { job_id, phase: 'before'|'after', taken_at }
 * - message.sent: { thread_id, template_id?, text_length }
 * - message.received: { thread_id }
 * - job_request.decision: { decision:'accepted'|'declined', good_faith_reason? }
 * - job.addon_completed: { completed:true }
 * - dispute.opened / dispute.resolved: { outcome? }
 * - tip.received
 */

type AnyJson = Record<string, any>;

export class SqlMetricProvider implements MetricProvider {
  async getMetric(params: {
    cleaner_id: string;
    metric_key: string;
    window?: Window | null;
    filters?: AnyJson;
    now?: Date;
  }): Promise<MetricValue> {
    const w = params.window ?? ({ type: "lifetime" } as const);
    const filters = params.filters ?? {};

    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      switch (params.metric_key) {
        // JOBS
        case "jobs.completed.count":
          return await jobsCompletedCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w, filters);

        case "jobs.completed.split_counts":
          return await jobsCompletedSplitCounts(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "jobs.on_time.count":
          return await jobsOnTimeCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "jobs.on_time.rate_percent":
          return await jobsOnTimeRatePercent(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "jobs.on_time.streak":
          return await jobsOnTimeStreak(client, params.cleaner_id);

        case "jobs.clock_in_out.success.count":
          return await jobsClockInOutSuccessCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "jobs.clock_in_out.missing.count":
          return await jobsClockInOutMissingCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "jobs.photos.valid.count":
          return await jobsPhotosValidCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "jobs.rescheduled.count":
          return await jobsRescheduledCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "jobs.cancelled_by_cleaner.count":
          return await jobsCancelledByCleanerCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "jobs.addons.completed.count":
          return await jobsAddonsCompletedCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        // MESSAGING + ENGAGEMENT
        case "messages.sent_to_clients.meaningful.count":
          return await meaningfulMessagesCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "engagement.meaningful_login_days.count":
          return await meaningfulLoginDaysCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "engagement.login_streak_days":
          return await meaningfulLoginStreakDays(client, params.cleaner_id);

        // ACCEPTANCE / REQUESTS
        case "job_requests.accepted.count":
          return await jobRequestsAcceptedCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "job_requests.acceptance_rate_percent":
          return await acceptanceRatePercent(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        // CLIENT LOYALTY
        case "clients.repeat_clients.count":
          return await repeatClientsCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w, filters);

        case "clients.count_with_min_jobs":
          return await clientsCountWithMinJobs(client, params.cleaner_id, w, filters);

        case "clients.max_jobs_with_single_client":
          return await clientsMaxJobsSingleClient(client, params.cleaner_id);

        // RATINGS
        case "ratings.avg_stars":
          return await ratingsAvgStars(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "ratings.five_star.count":
          return await ratingsFiveStarCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        // DISPUTES
        case "disputes.opened.count":
          return await disputesOpenedCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "disputes.lost.count":
          return await disputesLostCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "disputes.open_or_lost.count":
          return await disputesOpenOrLostCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "disputes.lost.rate_percent_lifetime":
          return await disputesLostRateLifetime(client, params.cleaner_id);

        // TIPS + COMPOSITES
        case "tips.received.count":
          return await tipsReceivedCount(client, params.cleaner_id, w);

        case "badges.composite.review_whisperer":
          return await compositeReviewWhisperer(client, params.cleaner_id);

        case "badges.composite.tip_jar_energy":
          return await compositeTipJarEnergy(client, params.cleaner_id);

        // RELIABILITY (optional)
        case "reliability.percentile":
          return await reliabilityPercentile(client, params.cleaner_id);

        default:
          return null;
      }
    });
  }
}

/* ---------------- JOBS ---------------- */

async function jobsCompletedCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window, filters: AnyJson): Promise<number> {
  let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c FROM jobs WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND status='completed'`;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND completed_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  if (filters.cleaning_type) {
    args.push(filters.cleaning_type);
    sql += ` AND cleaning_type=$${args.length}`;
  }

  if (filters.time_slot) {
    args.push(filters.time_slot);
    sql += ` AND time_slot=$${args.length}`;
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

async function jobsCompletedSplitCounts(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<Record<string, number>> {
  let sql = `SELECT cleaning_type, count(*)::int AS c FROM jobs WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND status='completed'`;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND completed_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  sql += ` GROUP BY cleaning_type`;
  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);

  const out: Record<string, number> = {};
  for (const r of rows) out[r.cleaning_type ?? "unknown"] = r.c;
  return out;
}

// On-time = clock-in within ±15 min of scheduled_start AND within 250m of job location.
async function jobsOnTimeCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  let sql = `
    WITH clockins AS (
      SELECT job_id,
        (payload->>'clock_in_at')::timestamptz AS clock_in_at,
        (payload->>'scheduled_start_at')::timestamptz AS scheduled_start_at,
        (payload->>'lat')::double precision AS lat,
        (payload->>'lng')::double precision AS lng
      FROM pt_event_log
      WHERE event_type='job.clock_in' AND cleaner_id=$1
    )
    SELECT count(*)::int AS c
    FROM jobs j
    JOIN clockins c ON c.job_id=j.id
    WHERE j.cleaner_id=$1 AND j.status='completed'
      AND c.clock_in_at BETWEEN (c.scheduled_start_at - interval '15 minutes')
                           AND (c.scheduled_start_at + interval '15 minutes')
      AND pt_within_radius_meters(c.lat, c.lng, j.lat, j.lng, 250)
  `;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND j.completed_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

async function jobsOnTimeRatePercent(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number | null> {
  let base = `
    WITH clockins AS (
      SELECT job_id,
        (payload->>'clock_in_at')::timestamptz AS clock_in_at,
        (payload->>'scheduled_start_at')::timestamptz AS scheduled_start_at,
        (payload->>'lat')::double precision AS lat,
        (payload->>'lng')::double precision AS lng
      FROM pt_event_log
      WHERE event_type='job.clock_in' AND cleaner_id=$1
    ),
    eligible AS (
      SELECT j.id, j.completed_at,
        CASE WHEN c.clock_in_at BETWEEN (c.scheduled_start_at - interval '15 minutes')
                                   AND (c.scheduled_start_at + interval '15 minutes')
              AND pt_within_radius_meters(c.lat, c.lng, j.lat, j.lng, 250)
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS on_time
      FROM jobs j
      JOIN clockins c ON c.job_id=j.id
      WHERE j.cleaner_id=$1 AND j.status='completed'
    )
    SELECT CASE
      WHEN count(*)=0 THEN NULL
      ELSE round(100.0 * sum(on_time)::numeric / count(*)::numeric, 2)::float
    END AS pct
    FROM eligible
  `;

  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    base = base.replace(
      "FROM eligible",
      `FROM eligible WHERE completed_at >= now() - ($2::int || ' days')::interval`
    );
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(base, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.pct ?? null;
}

async function jobsOnTimeStreak(client: any, cleanerId: string): Promise<number> {
  const sql = `
    WITH clockins AS (
      SELECT job_id,
        (payload->>'clock_in_at')::timestamptz AS clock_in_at,
        (payload->>'scheduled_start_at')::timestamptz AS scheduled_start_at,
        (payload->>'lat')::double precision AS lat,
        (payload->>'lng')::double precision AS lng
      FROM pt_event_log
      WHERE event_type='job.clock_in' AND cleaner_id=$1
    ),
    ordered AS (
      SELECT j.id, j.completed_at,
        CASE WHEN c.clock_in_at BETWEEN (c.scheduled_start_at - interval '15 minutes')
                                   AND (c.scheduled_start_at + interval '15 minutes')
              AND pt_within_radius_meters(c.lat, c.lng, j.lat, j.lng, 250)
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS on_time
      FROM jobs j
      LEFT JOIN clockins c ON c.job_id=j.id
      WHERE j.cleaner_id=$1 AND j.status='completed'
      ORDER BY j.completed_at DESC
      LIMIT 500
    ),
    marks AS (
      SELECT on_time, completed_at,
             sum(CASE WHEN on_time=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY completed_at DESC) AS breaks
      FROM ordered
    )
    SELECT count(*)::int AS streak
    FROM marks
    WHERE breaks=0 AND on_time=1
  `;
  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, [cleanerId]);
  return rows?.[0]?.streak ?? 0;
}

async function jobsClockInOutSuccessCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  let sql = `
    WITH cin AS (
      SELECT job_id,
        (payload->>'lat')::double precision AS lat,
        (payload->>'lng')::double precision AS lng
      FROM pt_event_log
      WHERE event_type='job.clock_in' AND cleaner_id=$1
    ),
    cout AS (
      SELECT job_id,
        (payload->>'lat')::double precision AS lat,
        (payload->>'lng')::double precision AS lng
      FROM pt_event_log
      WHERE event_type='job.clock_out' AND cleaner_id=$1
    )
    SELECT count(*)::int AS c
    FROM jobs j
    JOIN cin i ON i.job_id=j.id
    JOIN cout o ON o.job_id=j.id
    WHERE j.cleaner_id=$1 AND j.status='completed'
      AND pt_within_radius_meters(i.lat, i.lng, j.lat, j.lng, 250)
      AND pt_within_radius_meters(o.lat, o.lng, j.lat, j.lng, 250)
  `;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND j.completed_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

async function jobsClockInOutMissingCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  let sql = `
    WITH cin AS (SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM pt_event_log WHERE event_type='job.clock_in' AND cleaner_id=$1),
         cout AS (SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM pt_event_log WHERE event_type='job.clock_out' AND cleaner_id=$1)
    SELECT count(*)::int AS c
    FROM jobs j
    LEFT JOIN cin i ON i.job_id=j.id
    LEFT JOIN cout o ON o.job_id=j.id
    WHERE j.cleaner_id=$1 AND j.status='completed'
      AND (i.job_id IS NULL OR o.job_id IS NULL)
  `;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND j.completed_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

// Photos valid = >=1 before AND >=1 after between clock-in/out
async function jobsPhotosValidCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
  const daysClause = w.type === "days" ? " AND j.completed_at >= now() - ($2::int || ' days')::interval" : "";
  if (w.type === "days") args.push(w.value);

  const sql = `
    WITH cin AS (
      SELECT job_id, (payload->>'clock_in_at')::timestamptz AS t_in
      FROM pt_event_log WHERE event_type='job.clock_in' AND cleaner_id=$1
    ),
    cout AS (
      SELECT job_id, (payload->>'clock_out_at')::timestamptz AS t_out
      FROM pt_event_log WHERE event_type='job.clock_out' AND cleaner_id=$1
    ),
    photos AS (
      SELECT job_id,
        (payload->>'phase')::text AS phase,
        (payload->>'taken_at')::timestamptz AS taken_at
      FROM pt_event_log WHERE event_type='job.photo_uploaded' AND cleaner_id=$1
    ),
    per_job AS (
      SELECT j.id,
        sum(CASE WHEN p.phase='before' AND p.taken_at BETWEEN i.t_in AND o.t_out THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS before_ok,
        sum(CASE WHEN p.phase='after'  AND p.taken_at BETWEEN i.t_in AND o.t_out THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS after_ok
      FROM jobs j
      JOIN cin i ON i.job_id=j.id
      JOIN cout o ON o.job_id=j.id
      LEFT JOIN photos p ON p.job_id=j.id
      WHERE j.cleaner_id=$1 AND j.status='completed' ${daysClause}
      GROUP BY j.id
    )
    SELECT count(*)::int AS c
    FROM per_job
    WHERE before_ok >= 1 AND after_ok >= 1
  `;

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

// Reschedules / cancels:
// If you have domain tables, use them; if not, these safely return 0.
async function jobsRescheduledCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  try {
    let sql = `SELECT count(DISTINCT job_id)::int AS c
               FROM job_schedule_changes
               WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND system_initiated=false`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND created_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  } catch {
    return 0;
  }
}

async function jobsCancelledByCleanerCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  try {
    let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c
               FROM job_cancellations
               WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND cancellation_initiator='cleaner'`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND created_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  } catch {
    const { rows } = await client.query(
      `SELECT count(*)::int AS c
       FROM pt_event_log
       WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='job.cancelled'
         AND (payload->>'initiator')='cleaner'`,
      [cleanerId]
    );
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  }
}

    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND occurred_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

/* ---------------- MESSAGES ---------------- */

async function meaningfulMessagesCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  // Primary path uses messages table if it exists
  try {
    let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c
      FROM messages
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND direction='outbound'
        AND (template_id IS NOT NULL OR text_length >= 25 OR client_replied_within_24h=true)`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND created_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  } catch {
    // Event-based fallback (template OR length>=25 OR reply within 24h)
    let sql = `
      WITH sent AS (
        SELECT (payload->>'thread_id')::uuid AS thread_id,
               (payload->>'template_id')::text AS template_id,
               (payload->>'text_length')::int AS text_length,
               occurred_at
        FROM pt_event_log
        WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='message.sent'
      ),
      replied AS (
        SELECT (payload->>'thread_id')::uuid AS thread_id,
               occurred_at AS replied_at
        FROM pt_event_log
        WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='message.received'
      )
      SELECT count(*)::int AS c
      FROM sent s
      LEFT JOIN replied r
        ON r.thread_id=s.thread_id
       AND r.replied_at BETWEEN s.occurred_at AND (s.occurred_at + interval '24 hours')
      WHERE s.template_id IS NOT NULL OR s.text_length >= 25 OR r.thread_id IS NOT NULL
    `;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND s.occurred_at >= now() - ($2::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }

    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  }
}

/* ---------------- ENGAGEMENT ---------------- */

async function meaningfulLoginDaysCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  let sql = `
    WITH sessions AS (
      SELECT session_id, started_at, COALESCE(timezone,'UTC') AS tz
      FROM pt_engagement_sessions
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1
    ),
    qualified AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT (started_at AT TIME ZONE tz)::date AS local_day
      FROM sessions s
      WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM pt_engagement_actions a
        WHERE a.session_id=s.session_id
          AND a.occurred_at BETWEEN s.started_at AND (s.started_at + interval '15 minutes')
      )
    )
    SELECT count(*)::int AS c FROM qualified
  `;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql = `
      WITH sessions AS (
        SELECT session_id, started_at, COALESCE(timezone,'UTC') AS tz
        FROM pt_engagement_sessions
        WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND started_at >= now() - ($2::int || ' days')::interval
      ),
      qualified AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT (started_at AT TIME ZONE tz)::date AS local_day
        FROM sessions s
        WHERE EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM pt_engagement_actions a
          WHERE a.session_id=s.session_id
            AND a.occurred_at BETWEEN s.started_at AND (s.started_at + interval '15 minutes')
        )
      )
      SELECT count(*)::int AS c FROM qualified
    `;
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

async function meaningfulLoginStreakDays(client: any, cleanerId: string): Promise<number> {
  const sql = `
    WITH sessions AS (
      SELECT session_id, started_at, COALESCE(timezone,'UTC') AS tz
      FROM pt_engagement_sessions
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1
    ),
    qualified AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT (started_at AT TIME ZONE tz)::date AS local_day
      FROM sessions s
      WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM pt_engagement_actions a
        WHERE a.session_id=s.session_id
          AND a.occurred_at BETWEEN s.started_at AND (s.started_at + interval '15 minutes')
      )
    ),
    ordered AS (
      SELECT local_day, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY local_day DESC) AS rn
      FROM qualified
      ORDER BY local_day DESC
    ),
    grp AS (
      SELECT local_day, (local_day - rn::int) AS g
      FROM ordered
    )
    SELECT count(*)::int AS streak
    FROM grp
    WHERE g = (SELECT g FROM grp ORDER BY local_day DESC LIMIT 1)
  `;
  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, [cleanerId]);
  return rows?.[0]?.streak ?? 0;
}

/* ---------------- ACCEPTANCE ---------------- */

  let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c
             FROM pt_event_log
             WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='job_request.decision'
               AND (payload->>'decision')='accepted'`;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND occurred_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

/**
 * Acceptance rate:
 * accepts / (accepts + declines_non_good_faith)
 *
 * Good-faith declines are excluded only up to 6 in a rolling 7-day window.
 * After that, they count as non-good-faith for the denominator.
 *
 * NOTE:
 * The app should populate payload.good_faith_reason when it qualifies (distance>=11mi, outside availability, mismatch, safety, access, short_notice<18h).
 */
async function acceptanceRatePercent(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number | null> {
  let sql = `
    WITH decisions AS (
      SELECT occurred_at,
             (payload->>'decision') AS decision,
             (payload->>'good_faith_reason') AS gfr
      FROM pt_event_log
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='job_request.decision'
  `;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND occurred_at >= now() - ($2::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  sql += `
    ),
    tagged AS (
      SELECT d.*,
        CASE WHEN decision='declined' AND gfr IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_gf
      FROM decisions d
    ),
    limited AS (
      SELECT t.*,
        CASE
          WHEN t.is_gf=1 THEN
            CASE WHEN (
              SELECT count(*) FROM tagged t2
              WHERE t2.is_gf=1
                AND t2.occurred_at BETWEEN (t.occurred_at - interval '7 days') AND t.occurred_at
            ) <= 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
          ELSE 0
        END AS gf_exempt
      FROM tagged t
    ),
    agg AS (
      SELECT
        sum(CASE WHEN decision='accepted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS accepts,
        sum(CASE WHEN decision='declined' AND gf_exempt=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declines_non_gf
      FROM limited
    )
    SELECT CASE WHEN (accepts + declines_non_gf)=0 THEN NULL
                ELSE round(100.0 * accepts::numeric / (accepts + declines_non_gf)::numeric, 2)::float END AS pct
    FROM agg
  `;

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.pct ?? null;
}

/* ---------------- CLIENT LOYALTY ---------------- */

async function repeatClientsCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window, filters: AnyJson): Promise<number> {
  const minJobs = Number(filters.min_completed_jobs_per_client ?? 2);

  let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c FROM (
               SELECT client_id, count(*) AS jobs
               FROM jobs
               WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND status='completed'`;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND completed_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  sql += ` GROUP BY client_id
           ) x
           WHERE x.jobs >= $${args.length + 1}`;
  args.push(minJobs);

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
}

async function clientsCountWithMinJobs(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window, filters: AnyJson): Promise<number> {
  const minJobs = Number(filters.min_completed_jobs_per_client ?? 3);
  return await repeatClientsCount(client, cleanerId, w, { min_completed_jobs_per_client: minJobs });
}

async function clientsMaxJobsSingleClient(client: any, cleanerId: string): Promise<number> {
  const sql = `
    SELECT COALESCE(max(cnt),0)::int AS m
    FROM (
      SELECT client_id, count(*)::int AS cnt
      FROM jobs
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND status='completed'
      GROUP BY client_id
    ) x
  `;
  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, [cleanerId]);
  return rows?.[0]?.m ?? 0;
}

/* ---------------- RATINGS ---------------- */

async function ratingsAvgStars(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number | null> {
  let sql = `SELECT avg(stars)::float AS a FROM ratings WHERE cleaner_id=$1`;
  const args: any[] = [cleanerId];

  if (w.type === "days") {
    args.push(w.value);
    sql += ` AND created_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
  const a = rows?.[0]?.a;
  return a == null ? null : Number(a);
}

  }

  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);

}

/* ---------------- DISPUTES ---------------- */

async function disputesOpenedCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  try {
    let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c FROM disputes WHERE cleaner_id=$1`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND opened_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  } catch {
    let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c
               FROM pt_event_log
               WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='dispute.opened'`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND occurred_at >= now() - ($2::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  }
}

async function disputesLostCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  try {
    let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c FROM disputes WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND outcome='lost'`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND resolved_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  } catch {
    let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c
               FROM pt_event_log
               WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='dispute.resolved'
                 AND (payload->>'outcome')='lost'`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND occurred_at >= now() - ($2::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  }
}

async function disputesOpenOrLostCount(client: any, cleanerId: string, w: Window): Promise<number> {
  try {
    let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c FROM disputes WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND status IN ('open','lost')`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND opened_at >= now() - ($${args.length}::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  } catch {
    const opened = await disputesOpenedCount(client, cleanerId, w);
    const lost = await disputesLostCount(client, cleanerId, w);
    return opened + lost;
  }
}

async function disputesLostRateLifetime(client: any, cleanerId: string): Promise<number | null> {
  const lost = await disputesLostCount(client, cleanerId, { type: "lifetime" } as any);
  const completed = await jobsCompletedCount(client, cleanerId, { type: "lifetime" } as any, {});
  if (!completed) return null;
  return Math.round((100.0 * lost / completed) * 100) / 100;
}

      args.push(w.value);

    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  } catch {
    let sql = `SELECT count(*)::int AS c
               FROM pt_event_log
               WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='tip.received'`;
    const args: any[] = [cleanerId];
    if (w.type === "days") {
      args.push(w.value);
      sql += ` AND occurred_at >= now() - ($2::int || ' days')::interval`;
    }
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, args);
    return rows?.[0]?.c ?? 0;
  }
}

/* ---------------- COMPOSITES ---------------- */

async function compositeReviewWhisperer(client: any, cleanerId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  // 15 review requests + >=5 ratings within 60 days
  const sql = `
    WITH tmpl AS (
      SELECT count(*)::int AS c
      FROM pt_event_log
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='message.sent'
        AND (payload->>'template_id')='tmpl_review_request'
        AND occurred_at >= now() - interval '60 days'
    ),
    rev AS (
      SELECT count(*)::int AS c
      FROM ratings
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1
        AND created_at >= now() - interval '60 days'
    )
    SELECT (tmpl.c >= 15 AND rev.c >= 5) AS ok
    FROM tmpl, rev
  `;
  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, [cleanerId]);
  return Boolean(rows?.[0]?.ok);
}

async function compositeTipJarEnergy(client: any, cleanerId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  // 10 tip requests + >=3 tips within 90 days
  const sql = `
    WITH tmpl AS (
      SELECT count(*)::int AS c
      FROM pt_event_log
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND event_type='message.sent'
        AND (payload->>'template_id')='tmpl_tip_request'
        AND occurred_at >= now() - interval '90 days'
    ),
    t AS (
      SELECT count(*)::int AS c
      FROM tips
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1
        AND created_at >= now() - interval '90 days'
    )
    SELECT (tmpl.c >= 10 AND t.c >= 3) AS ok
    FROM tmpl, t
  `;
  const { rows } = await client.query(sql, [cleanerId]);
  return Boolean(rows?.[0]?.ok);
}

/* ---------------- RELIABILITY (optional) ---------------- */

async function reliabilityPercentile(client: any, cleanerId: string): Promise<number | null> {
  // If you have reliability_scores table. Otherwise return null safely.
  try {
    const sql = `
      WITH active AS (
        SELECT cleaner_id, reliability_score
        FROM reliability_scores
        WHERE computed_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
      ),
      ranked AS (
        SELECT cleaner_id,
               percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY reliability_score DESC) AS pr
        FROM active
      )
      SELECT round((pr * 100.0)::numeric, 2)::float AS pct
      FROM ranked
      WHERE cleaner_id=$1
    `;
    const { rows } = await client.query(sql, [cleanerId]);
    return rows?.[0]?.pct ?? null;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

# Step8 migration: idempotency + indexes + reward stacking policy table (optional)
migration = """
-- Step 8 — Reward granting + choice rewards idempotency (v1.4)
-- Requires Step 6 tables (gamification_reward_grants, gamification_choice_eligibilities).
BEGIN;

-- Idempotency: prevent duplicate grants for same cleaner+reward+source
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_reward_grants_source
  ON gamification_reward_grants (cleaner_id, reward_id, source_type, source_id);

-- Ensure only one open choice eligibility per goal (per cleaner)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uq_choice_open_per_goal
  ON gamification_choice_eligibilities (cleaner_id, source_goal_id)
  WHERE status='open';

-- Auto-expire choices that are too old (configurable); use a column for TTL
ALTER TABLE gamification_choice_eligibilities
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS expires_at timestamptz NULL;

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_choice_expires
  ON gamification_choice_eligibilities (status, expires_at);

COMMIT;
""".strip()+"\n"
(sql_dir/"step8_reward_idempotency_migration_v1_4.sql").write_text(migration)

# Reward grant service: reads goal progress completion events and config rewards
reward_service = """
import { withClient } from "../db/client";
import config from "../config/config.json";

/**
 * RewardGrantService
 * - Idempotently grants rewards when goals complete
 * - Creates choice eligibilities for choice_group rewards
 * - Applies stacking rules: "ignore", "extend", "stack_uses"
 *
 * Assumes config has:
 * - rewards: [{ id, kind, params, duration_days?, uses?, stacking }]
 * - goals: [{ id, reward_ids?, choice_group_id? }]
 */

type AnyJson = Record<string, any>;

export class RewardGrantService {
  private rewardsById: Map<string, AnyJson> = new Map();
  private goalsById: Map<string, AnyJson> = new Map();

  constructor() {
    for (const r of (config as any).rewards ?? []) this.rewardsById.set(r.id, r);
    for (const g of (config as any).goals ?? []) this.goalsById.set(g.id, g);
  }

  /**
   * Called after recompute: pass all completed goals for the cleaner, for this level or all levels.
   * This function will:
   * - grant rewards for newly completed goals (idempotent by uq_reward_grants_source)
   * - open choice eligibility if the goal has choice_group_id
   */
  async grantForCompletedGoals(cleaner_id: string, completed_goal_ids: string[]) {
    if (!completed_goal_ids?.length) return;

    for (const goal_id of completed_goal_ids) {
      const goal = this.goalsById.get(goal_id);
      if (!goal) continue;

      // Choice reward path
      if (goal.choice_group_id) {
        await this.openChoiceEligibility(cleaner_id, goal.choice_group_id, goal_id);
        continue;
      }

      // Direct rewards path
      const rewardIds: string[] = goal.reward_ids ?? [];
      for (const reward_id of rewardIds) {
        await this.grantReward(cleaner_id, reward_id, "goal", goal_id, { goal_id });
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * Grant a reward with stacking behavior.
   * - ignore: do nothing if an active grant exists for same reward_id
   * - extend: if active grant exists with ends_at, extend by duration_days
   * - stack_uses: if active grant exists with uses_remaining, add uses
   * Permanent rewards should have ends_at null and will be unique (uq_reward_grants_permanent_once from Step 6).
   */
  async grantReward(cleaner_id: string, reward_id: string, source_type: "goal"|"level"|"admin", source_id: string, meta: AnyJson) {
    const reward = this.rewardsById.get(reward_id);
    if (!reward) return;

    const durationDays: number | null = reward.duration_days ?? null;
    const uses: number | null = reward.uses ?? null;
    const stacking: "ignore"|"extend"|"stack_uses" = reward.stacking ?? "ignore";

    await withClient(async (client) => {
      // Idempotent check by source (unique index uq_reward_grants_source)
      // If already granted for this source, do nothing.
      const existing = await client.query(
        `SELECT id, ends_at, uses_remaining, status
         FROM gamification_reward_grants
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND reward_id=$2 AND source_type=$3 AND source_id=$4`,
        [cleaner_id, reward_id, source_type, source_id]
      );
      if (existing.rowCount > 0) return;

      // Check active grant for stacking logic
      const active = await client.query(
        `SELECT id, ends_at, uses_remaining
         FROM gamification_reward_grants
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND reward_id=$2 AND status='active'
         ORDER BY granted_at DESC
         LIMIT 1`,
        [cleaner_id, reward_id]
      );

      // Compute new ends_at / uses_remaining
      let ends_at: string | null = null;
      let uses_remaining: number | null = uses ?? null;

      if (durationDays != null) {
        // default ends_at = now + durationDays
        ends_at = new Date(Date.now() + durationDays*24*60*60*1000).toISOString();
      }

      if (active.rowCount > 0) {
        const a = active.rows[0];

        if (stacking === "ignore") {
          // If there is already an active grant of the same reward, do not grant a new one.
          return;
        }

        if (stacking === "extend" && a.ends_at) {
          const base = new Date(a.ends_at).getTime();
          const extended = base + (durationDays ?? 0)*24*60*60*1000;
          // Update existing grant end time, then record a new row (for audit) as expired/ignored? We keep it simple:
          await client.query(
            `UPDATE gamification_reward_grants
             SET ends_at = to_timestamp($1/1000.0)
             WHERE id=$2`,
            [extended, a.id]
          );
          // Also record the grant event (as audit) with status='revoked'? That complicates.
          // We'll instead insert a normal row but mark status='revoked' and meta.note='extended existing grant'.
          await client.query(
            `INSERT INTO gamification_reward_grants (cleaner_id, reward_id, source_type, source_id, status, meta)
             VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,'revoked',$5::jsonb)`,
            [cleaner_id, reward_id, source_type, source_id, JSON.stringify({ ...meta, note: "extended_existing_grant" })]
          );
          return;
        }

        if (stacking === "stack_uses" && a.uses_remaining != null && uses_remaining != null) {
          const newUses = Number(a.uses_remaining) + Number(uses_remaining);
          await client.query(
            `UPDATE gamification_reward_grants
             SET uses_remaining=$1
             WHERE id=$2`,
            [newUses, a.id]
          );
          await client.query(
            `INSERT INTO gamification_reward_grants (cleaner_id, reward_id, source_type, source_id, status, meta)
             VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,'revoked',$5::jsonb)`,
            [cleaner_id, reward_id, source_type, source_id, JSON.stringify({ ...meta, note: "stacked_uses_existing_grant" })]
          );
          return;
        }
      }

      // Insert new active grant
      await client.query(
        `INSERT INTO gamification_reward_grants
          (cleaner_id, reward_id, ends_at, uses_remaining, source_type, source_id, status, meta)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,'active',$7::jsonb)`,
        [cleaner_id, reward_id, ends_at, uses_remaining, source_type, source_id, JSON.stringify(meta ?? {})]
      );
    });
  }

  async openChoiceEligibility(cleaner_id: string, choice_group_id: string, source_goal_id: string) {
    // Default TTL: 14 days (config knob)
    const ttlDays = (config as any).choice_ttl_days ?? 14;
    const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + ttlDays*24*60*60*1000).toISOString();

    await withClient(async (client) => {
      // Idempotent: only one open per goal (uq_choice_open_per_goal)
      const existing = await client.query(
        `SELECT id FROM gamification_choice_eligibilities
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND source_goal_id=$2 AND status='open'`,
        [cleaner_id, source_goal_id]
      );
      if (existing.rowCount > 0) return;

      await client.query(
        `INSERT INTO gamification_choice_eligibilities
          (cleaner_id, choice_group_id, source_goal_id, earned_at, status, expires_at)
         VALUES ($1,$2,$3, now(), 'open', $4::timestamptz)`,
        [cleaner_id, choice_group_id, source_goal_id, expiresAt]
      );
    });
  }

  async selectChoiceReward(cleaner_id: string, eligibility_id: string, reward_id: string) {
    const reward = this.rewardsById.get(reward_id);
    if (!reward) throw new Error("invalid reward_id");

    await withClient(async (client) => {
      await client.query("BEGIN");

      const elig = await client.query(
        `SELECT id, choice_group_id, source_goal_id, status, expires_at
         FROM gamification_choice_eligibilities
         WHERE id=$1 AND cleaner_id=$2
         FOR UPDATE`,
        [eligibility_id, cleaner_id]
      );

      if (elig.rowCount === 0) {
        await client.query("ROLLBACK");
        throw new Error("eligibility not found");
      }

      const row = elig.rows[0];
      if (row.status !== "open") {
        await client.query("ROLLBACK");
        throw new Error("eligibility not open");
      }
      if (row.expires_at && new Date(row.expires_at).getTime() < Date.now()) {
        await client.query(
          `UPDATE gamification_choice_eligibilities SET status='expired' WHERE id=$1`,
          [eligibility_id]
        );
        await client.query("COMMIT");
        throw new Error("eligibility expired");
      }

      // Mark selected
      await client.query(
        `UPDATE gamification_choice_eligibilities
         SET status='selected', selected_reward_id=$1, selected_at=now()
         WHERE id=$2`,
        [reward_id, eligibility_id]
      );

      // Grant reward from choice selection
      await client.query("COMMIT");
    });

    // Grant after commit (safe, idempotent by source)
    await this.grantReward(cleaner_id, reward_id, "goal", `choice:${eligibility_id}`, { choice_eligibility_id: eligibility_id });
  }

  async expireChoices() {
    await withClient(async (client) => {
      await client.query(
        `UPDATE gamification_choice_eligibilities
         SET status='expired'
         WHERE status='open' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < now()`
      );
    });
  }

  async expireRewards() {
    await withClient(async (client) => {
      await client.query(
        `UPDATE gamification_reward_grants
         SET status='expired'
         WHERE status='active' AND ends_at IS NOT NULL AND ends_at < now()`
      );
    });
  }
}
""".strip()+"\n"
(services/"reward_grant_service.ts").write_text(reward_service)

# Route for selection and listing open eligibilities
routes_ts = """
import { Router } from "express";
import { RewardGrantService } from "../services/reward_grant_service";
import { withClient } from "../db/client";

export const rewardsRouter = Router();
const rewards = new RewardGrantService();

/**
 * List open choice eligibilities for cleaner
 */
rewardsRouter.get("/cleaners/:id/rewards/choices", async (req, res) => {
  const cleaner_id = req.params.id;
  const rows = await withClient(async (client) => {
    const { rows } = await client.query(
      `SELECT id, choice_group_id, source_goal_id, earned_at, expires_at
       FROM gamification_choice_eligibilities
       WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND status='open'
       ORDER BY earned_at DESC`,
      [cleaner_id]
    );
    return rows;
  });
  res.json({ ok:true, choices: rows });
});

/**
 * Select a reward for a choice eligibility.
 * Body: { eligibility_id, reward_id }
 */
rewardsRouter.post("/cleaners/:id/rewards/choices/select", async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const cleaner_id = req.params.id;
    const { eligibility_id, reward_id } = req.body ?? {};
    if (!eligibility_id || !reward_id) return res.status(400).json({ ok:false, error:"eligibility_id and reward_id required" });

    await rewards.selectChoiceReward(cleaner_id, String(eligibility_id), String(reward_id));
    res.json({ ok:true });
  } catch (e:any) {
    res.status(400).json({ ok:false, error: e.message ?? String(e) });
  }
});
""".strip()+"\n"
(routes/"rewards.ts").write_text(routes_ts)

# Worker hook: after recompute in processCleanerGamification, grant rewards for newly completed goals.
job_patch = """
import { ProgressionService } from "../services/progression_service";
import { RewardGrantService } from "../services/reward_grant_service";
import { withClient } from "../db/client";

/**
 * Worker: recompute, persist, level up, and grant rewards.
 * Idempotent reward granting.
 */
export async function processCleanerGamification(cleaner_id: string) {
  const service = new ProgressionService();
  const rewardService = new RewardGrantService();

  // First: expire time-based items (cheap, safe)
  await rewardService.expireRewards();
  await rewardService.expireChoices();

  await withClient(async (client) => {
    const { rows: lvlRows } = await client.query(
      `SELECT current_level FROM cleaner_level_status WHERE cleaner_id=$1`,
      [cleaner_id]
    );
    const current_level = lvlRows?.[0]?.current_level ?? 1;

    const { levelEval, goalProgress } = await service.getCleanerProgression(cleaner_id, current_level);

    // Persist goal progress
    for (const gp of goalProgress) {
      await client.query(
        `INSERT INTO cleaner_goal_progress (cleaner_id, goal_id, current_value, progress_ratio, completed, updated_at)
         VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4, $5, now())
         ON CONFLICT (cleaner_id, goal_id)
         DO UPDATE SET current_value=EXCLUDED.current_value, progress_ratio=EXCLUDED.progress_ratio, completed=EXCLUDED.completed, updated_at=now()`,
        [cleaner_id, gp.goal_id, JSON.stringify({ value: gp.current_value, remaining: gp.remaining }), gp.progress_ratio, gp.complete]
      );
    }

    // Persist pause status
    await client.query(
      `INSERT INTO cleaner_level_status (cleaner_id, current_level, paused, pause_reasons, updated_at)
       VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, now())
       ON CONFLICT (cleaner_id)
       DO UPDATE SET paused=EXCLUDED.paused, pause_reasons=EXCLUDED.pause_reasons, updated_at=now()`,
      [cleaner_id, current_level, levelEval.paused, JSON.stringify(levelEval.pause_reasons)]
    );

    // Level-up
    if (levelEval.eligible_for_level > current_level) {
      await client.query(
        `UPDATE cleaner_level_status SET current_level=$1, updated_at=now() WHERE cleaner_id=$2`,
        [levelEval.eligible_for_level, cleaner_id]
      );
    }

    // Determine newly completed goals: compare persisted state in DB
    const { rows: completedRows } = await client.query(
      `SELECT goal_id FROM cleaner_goal_progress WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND completed=true`,
      [cleaner_id]
    );
    const completed_goal_ids = (completedRows ?? []).map((r:any)=>String(r.goal_id));

    // Grant rewards (idempotent)
    await rewardService.grantForCompletedGoals(cleaner_id, completed_goal_ids);
  });
}
""".strip()+"\n"
(jobs/"process_cleaner_gamification_with_rewards.ts").write_text(job_patch)

# SQL: view for active reward effects + helper function to compute combined multiplier per kind
sql = """
-- Step 9 — Active Reward Effects + Ranking Enforcement (v1.5)
-- This builds DB-level helpers so any service can query active effects quickly.

BEGIN;

-- Active grants view (if Step 6 already created one, this is safe/redundant with IF NOT EXISTS pattern)
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW gamification_active_reward_grants AS
SELECT *
FROM gamification_reward_grants
WHERE status='active'
  AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at > now());

-- Flatten reward effects for a cleaner:
-- reward_definitions expected in config; we persist only reward_id + meta on grants.
-- We add a generic JSON "effect" lookup via application config; DB can't join config.
-- So this view just returns active reward_ids for consumption.
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW gamification_cleaner_active_rewards AS
SELECT cleaner_id,
       reward_id,
       granted_at,
       ends_at,
       uses_remaining,
       meta
FROM gamification_active_reward_grants;

-- Optional helper: mark a reward use (decrement uses_remaining)
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION gamification_use_reward(grant_id uuid)
RETURNS void
LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $$
BEGIN
  UPDATE gamification_reward_grants
  SET uses_remaining = CASE
      WHEN uses_remaining IS NULL THEN NULL
      WHEN uses_remaining <= 1 THEN 0
      ELSE uses_remaining - 1
    END,
    status = CASE
      WHEN uses_remaining IS NULL THEN status
      WHEN uses_remaining <= 1 THEN 'expired'
      ELSE status
    END
  WHERE id=grant_id AND status='active';
END;
$$;

COMMIT;
""".strip()+"\n"
(sql_dir/"step9_reward_effects_views_v1_5.sql").write_text(sql)

# Service to compute effective modifiers from active rewards + governor + level paused
reward_effects = """
import config from "../config/config.json";
import { withClient } from "../db/client";

type AnyJson = Record<string, any>;

export type RewardEffectContext = {
  cleaner_id: string;
  region_id?: string | null;
  now?: Date;
};

export type EffectiveEffects = {
  // ranking
  visibility_multiplier: number;      // multiplies base rank score
  early_exposure_minutes: number;     // time window boost
  addon_job_multiplier: number;       // applies only when job has add-ons
  // fees / payouts
  platform_fee_discount_percent: number;     // e.g. 3 means -3%
  instant_payout_fee_waivers_remaining: number; // uses
  // flags
  paused: boolean;
  pause_reasons: string[];
  active_reward_ids: string[];
};

/**
 * RewardEffectsService
 * Converts active reward grants into actionable effects for:
 * - matching/ranking (visibility, early exposure)
 * - fee/payout pricing (platform fee discount, instant payout waiver)
 *
 * RULES (LOCKED):
 * - Rewards are relative, never guarantees.
 * - If cleaner is paused (maintenance fail), effects return neutral values.
 * - Effects are capped by admin config and governor knobs.
 */
export class RewardEffectsService {
  private rewardsById = new Map<string, AnyJson>();
  private governorDefaults: AnyJson;

  constructor() {
    for (const r of (config as any).rewards ?? []) this.rewardsById.set(r.id, r);
    this.governorDefaults = (config as any).governor_defaults ?? {
      visibility_cap_multiplier: 1.35,
      early_exposure_cap_minutes: 30,
      fee_discount_cap_percent: 5
    };
  }

  async getEffectiveEffects(ctx: RewardEffectContext): Promise<EffectiveEffects> {
    const now = ctx.now ?? new Date();

    // 1) Check pause status (maintenance)
    const pause = await this.getPauseStatus(ctx.cleaner_id);
    if (pause.paused) {
      return {
        visibility_multiplier: 1.0,
        early_exposure_minutes: 0,
        addon_job_multiplier: 1.0,
        platform_fee_discount_percent: 0,
        instant_payout_fee_waivers_remaining: 0,
        paused: true,
        pause_reasons: pause.pause_reasons,
        active_reward_ids: []
      };
    }

    // 2) Load active reward grants
    const activeRewards = await this.getActiveRewardIds(ctx.cleaner_id);

    // 3) Apply governor knobs (regional)
    const gov = await this.getGovernorKnobs(ctx.region_id ?? null);

    // 4) Aggregate effects
    let visibility = 1.0;
    let early = 0;
    let addonMult = 1.0;

    let feeDiscount = 0;
    let instantWaivers = 0;

    for (const reward_id of activeRewards) {
      const reward = this.rewardsById.get(reward_id);
      if (!reward) continue;

      switch (reward.kind) {
        case "visibility_multiplier":
          visibility *= Number(reward.params?.multiplier ?? 1.0);
          break;
        case "early_exposure_minutes":
          early += Number(reward.params?.minutes ?? 0);
          break;
        case "addon_job_multiplier":
          addonMult *= Number(reward.params?.multiplier ?? 1.0);
          break;
        case "platform_fee_discount_percent":
          feeDiscount += Number(reward.params?.percent ?? 0);
          break;
        case "instant_payout_fee_waiver":
          instantWaivers += Number(reward.params?.uses ?? 0);
          break;
        default:
          break;
      }
    }

    // 5) Cap + normalize via admin/governor
    const visCap = Number(gov.visibility_cap_multiplier ?? this.governorDefaults.visibility_cap_multiplier);
    const earlyCap = Number(gov.early_exposure_cap_minutes ?? this.governorDefaults.early_exposure_cap_minutes);
    const feeCap = Number(gov.fee_discount_cap_percent ?? this.governorDefaults.fee_discount_cap_percent);

    visibility = Math.min(visibility, visCap);
    early = Math.min(early, earlyCap);
    feeDiscount = Math.min(feeDiscount, feeCap);

    return {
      visibility_multiplier: visibility,
      early_exposure_minutes: early,
      addon_job_multiplier: addonMult,
      platform_fee_discount_percent: feeDiscount,
      instant_payout_fee_waivers_remaining: instantWaivers,
      paused: false,
      pause_reasons: [],
      active_reward_ids: activeRewards
    };
  }

  private async getActiveRewardIds(cleaner_id: string): Promise<string[]> {
    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      const { rows } = await client.query(
        `SELECT reward_id
         FROM gamification_cleaner_active_rewards
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1`,
        [cleaner_id]
      );
      return (rows ?? []).map((r:any)=>String(r.reward_id));
    });
  }

  private async getPauseStatus(cleaner_id: string): Promise<{ paused: boolean; pause_reasons: string[] }> {
    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      const { rows } = await client.query(
        `SELECT paused, pause_reasons
         FROM cleaner_level_status
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1`,
        [cleaner_id]
      );
      if (!rows?.length) return { paused: false, pause_reasons: [] };
      return { paused: Boolean(rows[0].paused), pause_reasons: (rows[0].pause_reasons ?? []) as string[] };
    });
  }

  private async getGovernorKnobs(region_id: string | null): Promise<AnyJson> {
    if (!region_id) return this.governorDefaults;

    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      try {
        const { rows } = await client.query(
          `SELECT config
           FROM region_governor_config
           WHERE region_id=$1`,
          [region_id]
        );
        return rows?.[0]?.config ?? this.governorDefaults;
      } catch {
        return this.governorDefaults;
      }
    });
  }
}
""".strip()+"\n"
(services/"reward_effects_service.ts").write_text(reward_effects)

# Ranking integration: demonstrates how to apply multipliers without guarantees
ranker = """
import { RewardEffectsService } from "./reward_effects_service";

type CleanerCandidate = {
  cleaner_id: string;
  base_score: number;         // computed from distance, availability, rating, etc.
  distance_meters: number;
  is_available: boolean;
  has_addons: boolean;        // job includes add-ons
};

type RankedCleaner = CleanerCandidate & {
  final_score: number;
  applied: {
    visibility_multiplier: number;
    addon_job_multiplier: number;
    early_exposure_minutes: number;
  };
};

export class MatchingRanker {
  private effects = new RewardEffectsService();

  /**
   * Rank candidates for a job request.
   * Principles:
   * - Customer always chooses cleaner.
   * - Boosts are relative only (multipliers to base_score).
   * - Respect eligibility filters before ranking (availability, distance, job type).
   */
  async rank(opts: {
    region_id: string;
    candidates: CleanerCandidate[];
  }): Promise<RankedCleaner[]> {
    const out: RankedCleaner[] = [];

    for (const c of opts.candidates) {
      // Compute effective effects per cleaner
      const eff = await this.effects.getEffectiveEffects({ cleaner_id: c.cleaner_id, region_id: opts.region_id });

      // If paused, eff multipliers are neutral (1.0/0)
      let score = c.base_score * eff.visibility_multiplier;

      // Add-on spotlight applies only to add-on jobs
      if (c.has_addons) {
        score *= eff.addon_job_multiplier;
      }

      out.push({
        ...c,
        final_score: score,
        applied: {
          visibility_multiplier: eff.visibility_multiplier,
          addon_job_multiplier: c.has_addons ? eff.addon_job_multiplier : 1.0,
          early_exposure_minutes: eff.early_exposure_minutes
        }
      });
    }

    // Sort descending score (stable, no hard guarantees)
    out.sort((a,b)=>b.final_score - a.final_score);
    return out;
  }

  /**
   * Early exposure window:
   * In a "customer selects cleaner" flow, early exposure means:
   * - cleaner appears higher in "Top Picks" for X minutes after request is created
   * Implementation detail: your search endpoint can pass request_age_minutes
   * and apply a small multiplier only if request_age_minutes <= early_exposure_minutes.
   */
  async applyEarlyExposureBoost(params: {
    region_id: string;
    cleaner_id: string;
    request_age_minutes: number;
    base_score: number;
  }): Promise<number> {
    const eff = await this.effects.getEffectiveEffects({ cleaner_id: params.cleaner_id, region_id: params.region_id });
    if (eff.paused) return params.base_score;

    if (params.request_age_minutes <= eff.early_exposure_minutes) {
      // Small controlled bump; config knob
      const bump = (config as any).early_exposure_bump_multiplier ?? 1.08;
      return params.base_score * bump;
    }
    return params.base_score;
  }
}
""".strip()+"\n"
(services/"matching_ranker.ts").write_text(ranker)

# Fee/payout integration: how discounts/waivers apply
fee = """
import { RewardEffectsService } from "./reward_effects_service";
import { withClient } from "../db/client";

/**
 * FeePolicyService
 * Applies:
 * - platform fee discounts (percent)
 * - instant payout fee waivers (uses)
 *
 * Designed to be called at checkout (client price breakdown)
 * and at payout (cleaner payout fee line items).
 */
export class FeePolicyService {
  private effects = new RewardEffectsService();

  async computePlatformFeePercent(params: {
    cleaner_id: string;
    region_id: string;
    base_platform_fee_percent: number;
  }): Promise<number> {
    const eff = await this.effects.getEffectiveEffects({ cleaner_id: params.cleaner_id, region_id: params.region_id });
    if (eff.paused) return params.base_platform_fee_percent;

    const discounted = params.base_platform_fee_percent - eff.platform_fee_discount_percent;
    return Math.max(discounted, 0);
  }

  /**
   * Consume an instant payout fee waiver (1 use).
   * Call only when the cleaner chooses "instant payout" and fee would otherwise apply.
   */
  async maybeConsumeInstantPayoutWaiver(params: { cleaner_id: string }): Promise<boolean> {
    // Find an active waiver grant with uses_remaining > 0
    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      const { rows } = await client.query(
        `SELECT id, uses_remaining
         FROM gamification_reward_grants
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND status='active'
           AND reward_id IN (
             SELECT reward_id FROM gamification_cleaner_active_rewards WHERE cleaner_id=$1
           )
           AND uses_remaining IS NOT NULL AND uses_remaining > 0
         ORDER BY granted_at ASC
         LIMIT 1`,
        [params.cleaner_id]
      );

      if (!rows?.length) return false;

      const grant_id = rows[0].id;
      await client.query(`SELECT gamification_use_reward($1)`, [grant_id]);
      return true;
    });
  }
}
""".strip()+"\n"
(services/"fee_policy_service.ts").write_text(fee)

# API: explain rewards in practice + active effects endpoint for UI
api = """
import { Router } from "express";
import { RewardEffectsService } from "../services/reward_effects_service";

export const effectsRouter = Router();
const service = new RewardEffectsService();

/**
 * Get active effects for a cleaner (for UI + debugging).
 * Query param: region_id
 */
effectsRouter.get("/cleaners/:id/rewards/effects", async (req, res) => {
  const cleaner_id = req.params.id;
  const region_id = String(req.query.region_id ?? "");

  const effects = await service.getEffectiveEffects({ cleaner_id, region_id: region_id || null });
  res.json({ ok: true, effects });
});
""".strip()+"\n"
(routes/"reward_effects.ts").write_text(api)

# Docs: precise meaning of visibility + early exposure + fairness
meaning_doc = """
# Step 9 — What rewards mean in practice (implementation rules)

## Principle
Rewards never guarantee jobs. They only shift ordering / exposure inside eligible candidates.

## "Priority visibility" / "Better visibility"
Implemented as a **multiplier on the ranking score** used to order cleaners in the customer's list.

- Base ranking score is computed from:
  - distance, availability, service match
  - rating (stars), dispute history
  - response/acceptance performance
- Then apply:
  - visibility_multiplier (e.g., 1.10–1.25)

**Fairness constraints**
- Apply only among cleaners who are eligible:
  - within distance bounds
  - available for requested time
  - offer requested service type
- Cap total multiplier per region (governor):
  - default cap: 1.35

## "Early exposure"
Early exposure means: for X minutes after a request is created, a cleaner can receive a small bump inside the ranked list.

This does not mean the customer can't choose others.
It means the cleaner appears higher in:
- "Top Picks" carousel (if you have it)
- first page ordering

Default bump multiplier: 1.08 (config knob)
Cap early exposure minutes: 30 (governor cap)

## Add-on Spotlight
Applies only when job includes add-ons.
Implemented as addon_job_multiplier (e.g. 1.12).

## Maintenance pause
If cleaner is paused:
- levels never go down
- active effects return neutral (visibility=1, early=0, etc.)
- rewards can remain granted but are not applied until pause is cleared

## Auditability
Return effects via API:
GET /cleaners/:id/rewards/effects?region_id=...
So support can explain "why am I seeing this ordering?" without revealing other cleaners' info.
""".strip()+"\n"
(docs/"reward_meanings_and_fairness.md").write_text(meaning_doc)

readme = """
# Step 9 — Enforcement + Ranking Effects + Active Reward Application

This step connects rewards to actual platform behavior.

## Includes
- SQL views + use decrement function
- RewardEffectsService: aggregates active reward grants -> effective modifiers, respects maintenance pause and governor caps
- MatchingRanker example: applies visibility and add-on multipliers; explains early exposure logic
- FeePolicyService: applies platform fee discounts and consumes instant payout waiver uses
- API endpoint: GET /cleaners/:id/rewards/effects

## Integration Steps
1) Run sql/step9_reward_effects_views_v1_5.sql
2) Mount effectsRouter:
   app.use(effectsRouter)
3) In your "customer sees cleaners" endpoint:
   - compute base_score per cleaner
   - apply RewardEffectsService multipliers
   - apply early exposure bump if request_age_minutes <= early_exposure_minutes
4) In checkout/payout:
   - computePlatformFeePercent()
   - maybeConsumeInstantPayoutWaiver() if instant payout selected

## Config knobs
- governor_defaults.visibility_cap_multiplier
- governor_defaults.early_exposure_cap_minutes
- governor_defaults.fee_discount_cap_percent
- early_exposure_bump_multiplier
""".strip()+"\n"
(base/"README.md").write_text(readme)

base = Path("/mnt/data/puretask_gamification_step9")
if base.exists():
    for p in sorted(base.rglob("*"), reverse=True):
        if p.is_file():
            p.unlink()
        else:
            try: p.rmdir()
            except: pass
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

(sql_dir/"step9_reward_effects_views_v1_5.sql").write_text("""-- Step 9 — Active Reward Effects + Ranking Enforcement (v1.5)
BEGIN;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW gamification_active_reward_grants AS
SELECT *
FROM gamification_reward_grants
WHERE status='active'
  AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at > now());

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW gamification_cleaner_active_rewards AS
SELECT cleaner_id,
       reward_id,
       granted_at,
       ends_at,
       uses_remaining,
       meta
FROM gamification_active_reward_grants;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION gamification_use_reward(grant_id uuid)
RETURNS void
LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $$
BEGIN
  UPDATE gamification_reward_grants
  SET uses_remaining = CASE
      WHEN uses_remaining IS NULL THEN NULL
      WHEN uses_remaining <= 1 THEN 0
      ELSE uses_remaining - 1
    END,
    status = CASE
      WHEN uses_remaining IS NULL THEN status
      WHEN uses_remaining <= 1 THEN 'expired'
      ELSE status
    END
  WHERE id=grant_id AND status='active';
END;
$$;

COMMIT;
""")

(services/"reward_effects_service.ts").write_text("""import config from "../config/config.json";
import { withClient } from "../db/client";

type AnyJson = Record<string, any>;

export type RewardEffectContext = {
  cleaner_id: string;
  region_id?: string | null;
  now?: Date;
};

export type EffectiveEffects = {
  visibility_multiplier: number;
  early_exposure_minutes: number;
  addon_job_multiplier: number;

  platform_fee_discount_percent: number;
  instant_payout_fee_waivers_remaining: number;

  paused: boolean;
  pause_reasons: string[];
  active_reward_ids: string[];
};

export class RewardEffectsService {
  private rewardsById = new Map<string, AnyJson>();
  private governorDefaults: AnyJson;

  constructor() {
    for (const r of (config as any).rewards ?? []) this.rewardsById.set(r.id, r);
    this.governorDefaults = (config as any).governor_defaults ?? {
      visibility_cap_multiplier: 1.35,
      early_exposure_cap_minutes: 30,
      fee_discount_cap_percent: 5
    };
  }

  async getEffectiveEffects(ctx: RewardEffectContext): Promise<EffectiveEffects> {
    const pause = await this.getPauseStatus(ctx.cleaner_id);
    if (pause.paused) {
      return {
        visibility_multiplier: 1.0,
        early_exposure_minutes: 0,
        addon_job_multiplier: 1.0,
        platform_fee_discount_percent: 0,
        instant_payout_fee_waivers_remaining: 0,
        paused: true,
        pause_reasons: pause.pause_reasons,
        active_reward_ids: []
      };
    }

    const activeRewardIds = await this.getActiveRewardIds(ctx.cleaner_id);
    const gov = await this.getGovernorKnobs(ctx.region_id ?? null);

    let visibility = 1.0;
    let early = 0;
    let addonMult = 1.0;
    let feeDiscount = 0;
    let instantWaivers = 0;

    for (const reward_id of activeRewardIds) {
      const reward = this.rewardsById.get(reward_id);
      if (!reward) continue;

      switch (reward.kind) {
        case "visibility_multiplier":
          visibility *= Number(reward.params?.multiplier ?? 1.0);
          break;
        case "early_exposure_minutes":
          early += Number(reward.params?.minutes ?? 0);
          break;
        case "addon_job_multiplier":
          addonMult *= Number(reward.params?.multiplier ?? 1.0);
          break;
        case "platform_fee_discount_percent":
          feeDiscount += Number(reward.params?.percent ?? 0);
          break;
        case "instant_payout_fee_waiver":
          instantWaivers += Number(reward.params?.uses ?? 0);
          break;
      }
    }

    const visCap = Number(gov.visibility_cap_multiplier ?? this.governorDefaults.visibility_cap_multiplier);
    const earlyCap = Number(gov.early_exposure_cap_minutes ?? this.governorDefaults.early_exposure_cap_minutes);
    const feeCap = Number(gov.fee_discount_cap_percent ?? this.governorDefaults.fee_discount_cap_percent);

    visibility = Math.min(visibility, visCap);
    early = Math.min(early, earlyCap);
    feeDiscount = Math.min(feeDiscount, feeCap);

    return {
      visibility_multiplier: visibility,
      early_exposure_minutes: early,
      addon_job_multiplier: addonMult,
      platform_fee_discount_percent: feeDiscount,
      instant_payout_fee_waivers_remaining: instantWaivers,
      paused: false,
      pause_reasons: [],
      active_reward_ids: activeRewardIds
    };
  }

  private async getActiveRewardIds(cleaner_id: string): Promise<string[]> {
    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      const { rows } = await client.query(
        `SELECT reward_id
         FROM gamification_cleaner_active_rewards
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1`,
        [cleaner_id]
      );
      return (rows ?? []).map((r:any)=>String(r.reward_id));
    });
  }

  private async getPauseStatus(cleaner_id: string): Promise<{ paused: boolean; pause_reasons: string[] }> {
    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      const { rows } = await client.query(
        `SELECT paused, pause_reasons
         FROM cleaner_level_status
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1`,
        [cleaner_id]
      );
      if (!rows?.length) return { paused: false, pause_reasons: [] };
      return { paused: Boolean(rows[0].paused), pause_reasons: (rows[0].pause_reasons ?? []) as string[] };
    });
  }

  private async getGovernorKnobs(region_id: string | null): Promise<AnyJson> {
    if (!region_id) return this.governorDefaults;

    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      try {
        const { rows } = await client.query(
          `SELECT config
           FROM region_governor_config
           WHERE region_id=$1`,
          [region_id]
        );
        return rows?.[0]?.config ?? this.governorDefaults;
      } catch {
        return this.governorDefaults;
      }
    });
  }
}
""")

(services/"matching_ranker.ts").write_text("""import config from "../config/config.json";
import { RewardEffectsService } from "./reward_effects_service";

type CleanerCandidate = {
  cleaner_id: string;
  base_score: number;
  is_available: boolean;
  has_addons: boolean;
};

type RankedCleaner = CleanerCandidate & {
  final_score: number;
  applied: {
    visibility_multiplier: number;
    addon_job_multiplier: number;
    early_exposure_minutes: number;
  };
};

export class MatchingRanker {
  private effects = new RewardEffectsService();

  async rank(opts: { region_id: string; candidates: CleanerCandidate[] }): Promise<RankedCleaner[]> {
    const out: RankedCleaner[] = [];

    for (const c of opts.candidates) {
      const eff = await this.effects.getEffectiveEffects({ cleaner_id: c.cleaner_id, region_id: opts.region_id });

      let score = c.base_score * eff.visibility_multiplier;
      if (c.has_addons) score *= eff.addon_job_multiplier;

      out.push({
        ...c,
        final_score: score,
        applied: {
          visibility_multiplier: eff.visibility_multiplier,
          addon_job_multiplier: c.has_addons ? eff.addon_job_multiplier : 1.0,
          early_exposure_minutes: eff.early_exposure_minutes
        }
      });
    }

    out.sort((a, b) => b.final_score - a.final_score);
    return out;
  }

  async applyEarlyExposureBoost(params: {
    region_id: string;
    cleaner_id: string;
    request_age_minutes: number;
    base_score: number;
  }): Promise<number> {
    const eff = await this.effects.getEffectiveEffects({ cleaner_id: params.cleaner_id, region_id: params.region_id });
    if (eff.paused) return params.base_score;

    if (params.request_age_minutes <= eff.early_exposure_minutes) {
      const bump = (config as any).early_exposure_bump_multiplier ?? 1.08;
      return params.base_score * bump;
    }
    return params.base_score;
  }
}
""")

(services/"fee_policy_service.ts").write_text("""import { RewardEffectsService } from "./reward_effects_service";
import { withClient } from "../db/client";

export class FeePolicyService {
  private effects = new RewardEffectsService();

  async computePlatformFeePercent(params: {
    cleaner_id: string;
    region_id: string;
    base_platform_fee_percent: number;
  }): Promise<number> {
    const eff = await this.effects.getEffectiveEffects({ cleaner_id: params.cleaner_id, region_id: params.region_id });
    if (eff.paused) return params.base_platform_fee_percent;

    const discounted = params.base_platform_fee_percent - eff.platform_fee_discount_percent;
    return Math.max(discounted, 0);
  }

  async maybeConsumeInstantPayoutWaiver(params: { cleaner_id: string }): Promise<boolean> {
    return await withClient(async (client) => {
      const { rows } = await client.query(
        `SELECT id, uses_remaining
         FROM gamification_reward_grants
         WHERE cleaner_id=$1 AND status='active'
           AND uses_remaining IS NOT NULL AND uses_remaining > 0
         ORDER BY granted_at ASC
         LIMIT 1`,
        [params.cleaner_id]
      );

      if (!rows?.length) return false;

      await client.query(`SELECT gamification_use_reward($1)`, [rows[0].id]);
      return true;
    });
  }
}
""")

(routes/"reward_effects.ts").write_text("""import { Router } from "express";

export const effectsRouter = Router();
const service = new RewardEffectsService();

effectsRouter.get("/cleaners/:id/rewards/effects", async (req, res) => {
  const cleaner_id = req.params.id;
  const region_id = String(req.query.region_id ?? "");
  const effects = await service.getEffectiveEffects({ cleaner_id, region_id: region_id || null });
  res.json({ ok: true, effects });
});

## "Priority visibility" / "Better visibility"
Implemented as a multiplier on the ranking score used to order cleaners in the customer's list.

Fairness constraints:
- only among eligible cleaners (distance/availability/service match)
- capped per region (default cap 1.35)
- never a guarantee; customers can always scroll/select

## "Early exposure"
For X minutes after a request is created, the cleaner receives a small bump inside ranked ordering.
Default bump multiplier: 1.08 (config knob).
Cap early exposure minutes: 30 (governor cap).

## Add-on Spotlight

## Maintenance pause

- levels never go down
- effects become neutral (visibility=1, early=0, etc.)
- rewards resume once pause clears

(base/"README.md").write_text("""# Step 9 — Enforcement + Ranking Effects + Active Reward Application

## Includes
- SQL views + reward use decrement function
- RewardEffectsService: converts active reward grants into effective modifiers, respects pause and governor caps
- MatchingRanker example: applies visibility + add-on multipliers and shows early exposure implementation
- FeePolicyService: applies platform fee discounts and consumes waiver uses
- API: GET /cleaners/:id/rewards/effects

## Integration
1) Run sql/step9_reward_effects_views_v1_5.sql
2) Mount effectsRouter in your API
3) Apply RewardEffectsService in your matching/listing endpoint and checkout/payout
